<!-- Thanks for the contribution! Keep PRs focused — one logical change per PR. -->

## Summary
<!-- Why is this change needed? What does it do? -->

## Related issue
<!-- e.g. Fixes #123 / Refs #456 -->

## Type of change
<!-- Pick one. -->
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist
- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files` passes locally
- [ ] `pylint --rcfile=.codacy/tools-configs/pylint.rc src/` passes
- [ ] App still launches and the change works manually on my OS
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] No API tokens, account IDs, or other secrets in the diff or screenshots

## Screenshots / notes
<!-- For UI changes, include before/after screenshots. -->
